en: "For behold, in those days and at that time, when I restore the fortunes of Judah and Jerusalem,
zh: “看哪！到了那些日子，在那個時期， 我使猶大和耶路撒冷被擄的人歸回，

en: I will gather all the nations and bring them down to the Valley of Jehoshaphat. And I will enter into judgment with them there, on behalf of my people and my heritage Israel, because they have scattered them among the nations and have divided up my land,
zh: 我必招聚列國， 領他們下到約沙法谷， 為了我的子民，就是我的產業以色列， 我要在那裡親臨審判他們， 因為他們把我的子民分散在列國中， 又分取了我的地土。

en: and have cast lots for my people, and have traded a boy for a prostitute, and have sold a girl for wine and have drunk it.
zh: 他們為我的子民抽籤， 用男童交換妓女， 女童被賣換酒喝。

en: "What are you to me, O Tyre and Sidon, and all the regions of Philistia? Are you paying me back for something? If you are paying me back, I will return your payment on your own head swiftly and speedily.
zh: “推羅、西頓和非利士四境的人哪！你們想對我作甚麼呢？你們想向我報復嗎？你們若向我報復，我很快就使報應歸在你們的頭上。

en: For you have taken my silver and my gold, and have carried my rich treasures into your temples.
zh: 你們拿去了我的金銀，又把我的珍寶帶進了你們的廟宇。

en: You have sold the people of Judah and Jerusalem to the Greeks in order to remove them far from their own border.
zh: 你們把猶大人和耶路撒冷人賣給希臘人，使他們遠離自己的境界。

en: Behold, I will stir them up from the place to which you have sold them, and I will return your payment on your own head.
zh: 看哪！我要激動他們離開被你們賣到的地方，我也要使報應歸到你們的頭上。

en: I will sell your sons and your daughters into the hand of the people of Judah, and they will sell them to the Sabeans, to a nation far away, for the LORD has spoken."
zh: 我必把你們的兒女賣在猶大人的手中，猶大人必把他們賣給遠方示巴國的人，因為這是耶和華說的。”

en: Proclaim this among the nations: Consecrate for war; stir up the mighty men. Let all the men of war draw near; let them come up.
zh: 你們要在列國中宣告以下這話： “你們要預備爭戰， 要激動勇士。 讓所有的戰士都近前來，讓他們都上去攻擊。

en: Beat your plowshares into swords, and your pruning hooks into spears; let the weak say, "I am a warrior."
zh: 要把犁頭打成刀劍， 把鐮刀打成矛槍； 軟弱的要說： ‘我是勇士。’

en: Hasten and come, all you surrounding nations, and gather yourselves there. Bring down your warriors, O LORD.
zh: 四圍的列國啊！ 你們快來幫助， 在那裡一同聚集。 耶和華啊！求你叫你的勇士下來吧。

en: Let the nations stir themselves up and come up to the Valley of Jehoshaphat; for there I will sit to judge all the surrounding nations.
zh: “萬國都當奮起， 上到約沙法谷去。 因為我必坐在那裡， 審判四圍的列國。

en: Put in the sickle, for the harvest is ripe. Go in, tread, for the winepress is full. The vats overflow, for their evil is great.
zh: 你們要伸出鐮刀， 因為莊稼已經熟了。 來踐踏吧， 因為壓酒池滿了， 酒池盈溢， 因為他們的罪惡極大。

en: Multitudes, multitudes, in the valley of decision! For the day of the LORD is near in the valley of decision.
zh: 無數的人群 齊集在判決谷， 因為耶和華的日子臨近了判決谷。

en: The sun and the moon are darkened, and the stars withdraw their shining.
zh: 日月昏暗， 星星無光。

en: The LORD roars from Zion, and utters his voice from Jerusalem, and the heavens and the earth quake. But the LORD is a refuge to his people, a stronghold to the people of Israel.
zh: 耶和華從錫安吼叫， 並從耶路撒冷發聲， 天地就震動。 耶和華卻要作他子民的避難所， 作以色列眾子的保障。

en: "So you shall know that I am the LORD your God, who dwell in Zion, my holy mountain. And Jerusalem shall be holy, and strangers shall never again pass through it.
zh: 你們知道我是耶和華你們的 神， 是住在錫安我的聖山上。 那時，耶路撒冷必成為聖。 外族人必不得從其中經過。

en: "And in that day the mountains shall drip sweet wine, and the hills shall flow with milk, and all the streambeds of Judah shall flow with water; and a fountain shall come forth from the house of the LORD and water the Valley of Shittim.
zh: 到那日， 大山都必滴下甜酒， 小山都必流出奶， 猶大的一切溪流， 都必水流不息。 必有泉源從耶和華的殿裡流出來， 灌溉什亭谷。

en: "Egypt shall become a desolation and Edom a desolate wilderness, for the violence done to the people of Judah, because they have shed innocent blood in their land.
zh: 埃及將會荒涼， 以東必變成淒涼的曠野， 都因為他們向猶大人所行的強暴， 又因為在他們的國中流了無辜人血。

en: But Judah shall be inhabited forever, and Jerusalem to all generations.
zh: “但猶大必存到永遠， 耶路撒冷也必存到萬代。

en: I will avenge their blood, blood I have not avenged, for the LORD dwells in Zion."
zh: 現在我要追討我還未有追討的流人血的罪。 耶和華在錫安居住。”
